indications.text:
KYZATREX is indicated for testosterone replacement therapy in adult males for conditions
associated with a deficiency or absence of endogenous testosterone:
• Primary hypogonadism (congenital or acquired): testicular failure due to conditions such
as cryptorchidism, bilateral torsion, orchitis, vani...
7.4 Medications that May Also Increase Blood Pressure
